story-bg-velmora-4d5e6f.query: Jewelry That Feels Like You At Velmora, we believe fine jewelry should not be reserved for special occasions. Every piece in our collection is designed to be worn daily — to work, to brunch, to quiet moments alone. Crafted with 18K gold plating and hypoallergenic materials, our demi-fine collection offers luxury you can live in.
